# PERF-051 negative: no unsafe.Pointer in the request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-051-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func HandleSafe(c *gin.Context) {
	s := string([]byte("hello world"))
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"value": s})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
